name: 4D Projection Dream Weavers
description: A continuous slice through 4-dimensional fractal space. The mouse smoothly controls two extra dimensions, allowing genuine exploration of higher-dimensional forms. Audio modulates scale, speed, and detail.

params.name: Base Scale
params.description: Overall zoom level in 4D space

params.name: Temporal Speed
params.description: How fast the 4D structure evolves

params.name: Fractal Detail
params.description: Amount of fine detail visible

params.name: 4D Mouse Sensitivity
params.description: How strongly the mouse moves through the extra dimensions

name: Volumetric Fog
description: Volumetric fog with ray marching, Mie/Rayleigh scattering, height-based density, god rays, and mouse-controlled light source

name: Geometric Pulse
description: Audio-reactive geometric patterns with kaleidoscope symmetry, shape morphing, neon glow, and frequency band visualization

name: Lenia Continuous
description: Continuous cellular automata (Lenia) with smooth growth functions, multiple kernel radii, and biological emergence patterns

name: Bioluminescent Abyss
description: An infinite deep underwater landscape with swaying tube worms and thermal vents, featuring bioluminescence and deep sea atmosphere.

name: Bubble Chamber
description: Simulates subatomic particle trails in a magnetic field using a feedback loop.

name: Chrono-Voronoi Mycelium
description: A living fungal network that grows across multiple time scales. Different generations of mycelium coexist as translucent layers. Mouse seeds new growth while audio seasons control the balance between expansion and decay.

params.name: Growth Bias
params.description: Favors newer vs older growth generations

params.name: Temporal Scale
params.description: How spread out the different time layers are

params.name: Decay Influence
params.description: How strongly older generations fade

params.name: Pattern Complexity
params.description: Controls the density of the smallest mycelium threads

name: Cosmic Jellyfish
description: A majestic, translucent jellyfish floating in a cosmic void, with bioluminescent glow and rhythmic pulsation.

name: Cosmic Web Filament
description: Simulates the large-scale structure of the universe with dark matter filaments and voids. Mouse acts as a gravity well.

name: Emergent Calligraphic Weave
description: Strokes follow an evolving orientation field to spontaneously form complex symbolic and calligraphic patterns. The system self-organizes into glyph-like structures that respond to sound and mouse interaction.

params.name: Field Complexity
params.description: How intricate the underlying orientation field is

params.name: Stroke Persistence
params.description: How long strokes remain visible before fading

params.name: Pattern Coherence
params.description: Encourages formation of larger connected structures

params.name: Field Chaos
params.description: Adds turbulence to the orientation field

name: Fire Smoke Volumetric
description: Volumetric fire and smoke with ray marching, curl noise turbulence, blackbody temperature coloring, and density-based alpha

name: 4D Projection Dream Weavers
description: Smooth continuous slicing and projection through higher-dimensional fractals and lattices. Mouse controls navigation through the extra two dimensions providing genuine higher-dimensional exploration. Audio affects fractal parameters and projection quality. Ethereal mathematical dream-like forms.

params.name: Zoom Level
params.description: Zoom level in 4D fractal space

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed of 4D rotation through hyperspace

params.name: Color Shift
params.description: Hue rotation of the color palette

params.name: Detail Level
params.description: Fractal iteration depth and detail

name: Abyssal Chrono-Coral
description: A vast abyssal coral reef drifting through gravitational time. Slow geological growth rings expand over eons. Mids and treble drive bioluminescent pulses. Mouse clicks create sediment disturbance events that trigger sudden bloom explosions across the reef. Gravitational lensing bends light around dense coral structures.

params.name: Coral Density
params.description: Overall density and thickness of the coral structures

params.name: Branch Complexity
params.description: How many iterative folds the fractal coral performs

params.name: Bioluminescence Intensity
params.description: Base strength of the glowing nodes (further driven by mids/treble)

params.name: Time Dilation Field
params.description: How strongly the mouse slows local geological time

name: Abyssal Leviathan-Scales
description: A mesmerizing, infinite expanse of massive, interlocking biomechanical armor scales that undulate like a breathing cosmic leviathan, parting to reveal a blazing, audio-reactive quantum fusion core beneath.

name: Acid Lissajous
description: Seven Lissajous curve strands rendered as glowing neon tubes with continuous acid-trip color cycling, harmonic drift, and soft bloom. Each strand traces a different frequency ratio pair that slowly evolves for ever-changing knotted patterns.

name: Alien Flora
description: An infinite procedural forest of bioluminescent alien vegetation with swaying mushrooms and atmospheric fog.

name: Alpha Aurora
description: Procedural aurora borealis with spectral band blending and density-based alpha translucency. Curl noise drives organic flow across multiple spectral bands with audio-reactive brightness and atmospheric glow.

name: Aperiodic Monotile Hat
description: Aperiodic hat tiling (monotile) with animated edge glow and audio-reactive color cycling. Rotates and scales with parameters.

params.name: Tile Scale
params.description: Density of tiling

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed of tiling rotation

params.name: Edge Width
params.description: Width of tile edge glow

params.name: Saturation
params.description: Color saturation intensity

name: Art Deco Skyscraper
description: Infinite vertical ascent up a monumental Art Deco tower with gold fluting and geometric patterns.

name: Astro-Kinetic Chrono-Orrery
description: A hyper-intricate cosmic mechanism of nested, rotating brass and energy rings orbiting a blazing quantum singularity, merging celestial mechanics with clockwork precision.

name: Audio Spirograph
description: Audio-reactive spirograph with harmonic resonance using epitrochoid and hypotrochoid curves with musical frequency ratios

name: Audiovisual Mandelbulb
description: Raymarched 3D Mandelbulb fractal with video texture mapping, audio-reactive geometry mutation, and depth output.

name: Aurora Borealis Synthesis
description: Render a 3D volume of swirling aurora light and project it onto the 2D video surface, with audio-driven motion and depth-based mapping.

name: Auroral Ferrofluid-Monolith
description: A colossal liquid-metal monolith whose surface forms readable magnetic glyphs under strong bass, then collapses into chaotic auroral breakup on treble. Mouse drag rotates an external magnetic field that sculpts the ferrofluid in real time.

params.name: Spike Length
params.description: Base spike length (strongly amplified by bass into glyph structures)

params.name: Aurora Intensity
params.description: Strength of the surrounding auroral volumetric field

params.name: Magnetic Twist
params.description: Internal twisting of the monolith under magnetic forces

params.name: Fluid Metallic Response
params.description: How sharply the ferrofluid surface reflects and behaves metallically

name: Bifurcation Diagram
description: Logistic map bifurcation diagram visualizing the transition from order to chaos with density-based coloring and Lyapunov exponent highlighting

name: Bio-Luminescent Jelly
description: SDF tentacle jellyfish with pulsing bio-luminescence and glow-intensity alpha encoding. Audio drives pulse rhythm and sparkle particles; mouse attracts the jellyfish and creates shockwaves.

params.name: Pulsar Spin Rate
params.description: Rotation speed of the pulsar core

params.name: Beam Intensity
params.description: Intensity of the volumetric beams

params.name: Accretion Density
params.description: Density and detail of the accretion disk

params.name: Color Shift
params.description: Shifts the color palette of the pulsar

name: Biomechanical Hive
description: An infinite, claustrophobic structure of hexagonal cells blending industrial machinery with organic tissue. Features pulsating lights, rhythmic breathing, and slimy metallic textures.

name: Bismuth Crystal Citadel
description: Endless procedural canyon of iridescent bismuth crystals with physical light transmission. Features metallic Fresnel reflection, thin-film interference, and oxide layer transmission.
author: AI

params.name: Terrace Step Size
params.description: Size of stepped terraces characteristic of bismuth crystals

params.name: Ascension Speed
params.description: Camera movement speed through the crystal citadel

params.name: Metallic Shine
params.description: Specular highlight intensity on metallic surfaces

params.name: Iridescence Shift
params.description: Thin-film interference color shift on crystal surfaces

name: Brutalist Monument
description: Massive concrete architecture in an atmospheric void.

name: Celestial Forge
description: A massive sci-fi megastructure enclosing a miniature star, featuring contra-rotating rings, plasma arcs, and glowing panels.
author: AI

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed of the contra-rotating ring structure.

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Number of rings and surface detail density.

params.name: Ring Scale
params.description: Overall size of the ring structure.

params.name: Core Intensity
params.description: Brightness of the central star and emitted light.

params.name: Vortex Twist
params.description: Twist of the vortex

params.name: Debris Density
params.description: Density of debris particles

params.name: Chromatic Split
params.description: Chromatic aberration split

params.name: Audio Reactivity
params.description: Audio reactivity multiplier

name: Celestial Nanite-Swarm Nebula
description: A majestic, slowly churning nebula constructed entirely from trillions of glowing, synchronized nanites that dynamically self-assemble into intricate, shifting geometric constellations and colossal architectural megastructures in deep space.

name: Celestial Prism-Orchid
description: A mesmerizing, infinite expanse of refractive, crystalline petals that fold, bloom, and scatter starlight into vivid chromatic spectrums, dynamically responding to cosmic winds and audio vibrations.

name: Celestial Yggdrasil-Matrix
description: An infinitely branching, cosmic tree constructed from intertwining ribbons of stellar plasma and quantum circuitry that pulses with the heartbeat of the universe, fusing organic arboreal forms with intricate cosmic geometry.
author: Jules

name: Cellular Automata Tapestry
description: Convert the video feed into a living reaction-diffusion tapestry.

name: Chaos Game IFS
description: Iterated function system chaos game generating fractal attractors. Audio drives iteration depth and attractor scale. Rotating attractor points.

params.name: Iterations
params.description: IFS iteration depth

params.name: Glow Size
params.description: Attractor glow radius

params.name: Ring Count
params.description: Density of concentric rings

params.name: Saturation
params.description: Color saturation

name: Chromatic Metamorphosis
description: Metaballs morph continuously between sphere, torus, box, and capsule shapes via smooth-min SDF blending. Surface color evolves independently from geometry in flowing waves.
author: AI

params.name: Morph Speed
params.description: Speed of shape transformation cycle.

params.name: Color Speed
params.description: Speed at which surface color evolves independently of geometry.

params.name: Blend Radius
params.description: Smooth-min radius for SDF blending between shapes.

params.name: Light Intensity
params.description: Intensity of the key light illuminating the morphing form.

name: Chromatic Singularity-Loom
description: A majestic, gravity-warped cosmic loom weaving fractal strings of pure light around a central singularity.

name: Chromodynamic Plasma-Collider
description: A hyper-speed journey down an infinite magnetic containment tunnel where sub-atomic particles collide and shatter into vibrant, audio-reactive showers of exotic matter.

name: Chrono-Mycelial Tapestry
description: A multi-temporal fungal network where different generations of mycelium coexist in layered time, creating a living, breathing tapestry of organic growth across temporal dimensions.

name: Chrono-Voronoi Mycelium
description: Multi-temporal Voronoi fungal growth system where different generations of mycelium exist as layered temporal states, creating organic networks that evolve across time. Mouse introduces nutrients affecting multiple time layers. Audio controls growth vs decay rates.

params.name: Growth Rate
params.description: Speed of mycelial growth across time layers

params.name: Generations
params.description: Number of temporal mycelium generations

params.name: Decay Rate
params.description: How quickly older generations fade

params.name: Tip Glow
params.description: Intensity of glowing network tips

name: Chronos Labyrinth
description: An infinite, Escher-esque maze of shifting geometric staircases and corridors suspended over a void, with glowing temporal anomalies.

params.name: Atmospheric Perspective
params.description: Distance fade intensity

name: Cosmic-Clockwork Dyson-Sphere
description: A hyper-intricate, colossal megastructure of interlocking golden gears, glowing plasma conduits, and rhythmic mechanical fractal shifts, enclosing a blinding quantum singularity that powers an ancient stellar clock.

name: Cosmic Web Filament
description: Dark matter web with Voronoi filaments, FBM warping, and mouse gravity wells. Hypnotic cosmic structure with purple-to-cyan gradients.
author: ford442

name: Crystal Caverns
description: Infinite procedural cave system with glowing crystals featuring physical light transmission. Crystals have IOR-based Fresnel reflection and variable purity affecting their glow transparency.
author: ford442

params.name: Cave Scale
params.description: Size of cave structures

params.name: Crystal Purity
params.description: Crystal clarity affecting transmission and glow

params.name: Glow Intensity
params.description: Brightness of crystal glow

params.name: Fog Density
params.description: Volumetric fog density

name: Crystalline Chrono-Dyson
description: A colossal, self-assembling Dyson sphere constructed of hyper-refractive crystal panels and flowing plasma conduits that orbit and extract energy from a dying, audio-reactive micro-quasar.

name: Crystalline Mandala Bloom
description: Audio-reactive kaleidoscopic mandala that folds the source image through a rotating polar symmetry. Crystalline petal SDFs, hue-rotated chroma, concentric bass-rings, and treble sparkles bloom outward from a mouse-anchored center.

name: Procedural Cyber Terminal (ASCII)
description: Transforms the input video feed or image into a high-tech, procedural ASCII terminal display using Signed Distance Functions (SDFs).

name: Cybernetic Ferro-Coral
description: A biomechanical reef of magnetic, liquid-metal coral that dynamically shapes itself in response to acoustic vibrations, revealing a glowing quantum-plasma core beneath a dark metallic exterior.

name: Cybernetic Liquid-Chrome Engine
description: A colossal, endlessly shifting mechanical engine constructed of hyper-reflective liquid chrome, pumping iridescent plasma through infinitely complex fractal pistons that react to the heavy bass of audio frequencies.

name: Cycloid Bloom
description: Five nested hypotrochoid (Spirograph-style) curves layered into a blooming floral mandala. Each layer uses a different gear ratio that slowly evolves, petal glowing with prismatic hues that respond to audio. Feedback accumulation burns bright arcs.

name: Cymatic Plasma-Mandalas
description: A hyper-intricate, unfolding kaleidoscope of glowing liquid geometry that dances and weaves complex, sacred-geometry-inspired mandalas in direct response to audio frequencies.

name: Peter de Jong Attractor
description: Strange attractor density accumulation for the 2D Peter de Jong map: x' = sin(a·y)−cos(b·x), y' = sin(c·x)−cos(d·y). Parameters slowly morph through time, continuously transforming the attractor topology through butterflies, snowflakes, spirographs, and alien lace-work. Temporal Monte Carlo builds density; bass warps the geometry; mouse pans and click-zooms.

name: Depth-Refracted Liquid Stained Glass
description: Transform the input video into a shattering, ornate cathedral window that feels tactile, refractive, and symmetrically kaleidoscopic.

name: Dynamic Tessellation (Ornate Fractal Tiles)
description: Compute a screen-space tile grid and replace each tile with a tiny procedurally rendered fractal. The result is a morphing lattice of fractal mini-universes. Now audio-reactive to bass frequencies with meaningful alpha compositing.

name: Eldritch-Quantum Fractal-Eye
description: A colossal, hyper-dimensional eye constructed from infinitely folding quantum fractals and liquid plasma.

name: Eldritch Tesseract-Hive Mind
description: An impossible, non-Euclidean hypercube hive populated by swarms of luminescent algorithmic sentinels, constantly unfolding and fracturing into new geometric dimensions driven by quantum noise and acoustic energy.

name: Emergent Calligraphic Ecosystems
description: A system of interacting calligraphic strokes following local orientation rules that spontaneously form complex alien writing systems. Mouse plants seeds or disturbs regions. Audio influences stroke behavior and interaction rules. Elegant ink-like or neon self-organizing glyphs.

params.name: Stroke Density
params.description: Number of calligraphic strokes per glyph cluster

params.name: Ink Width
params.description: Width of individual brush strokes

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Scale and complexity of glyph clusters

params.name: Neon Mode
params.description: 0=dark ink on paper, 1=neon calligraphy

name: Emergent Script Gardens
description: Interacting ink-like and neon strokes follow local rules to self-organize into alien symbolic gardens. Mouse interaction plants dense stroke seeds, while audio bands influence stroke curvature, length, and glyph clustering.

params.name: Stroke Density
params.description: Number of interacting strokes in each symbolic garden cluster

params.name: Curvature
params.description: How strongly strokes bend through the local rule field

params.name: Garden Scale
params.description: Scale and spacing of emergent glyph clusters

params.name: Ink / Neon
params.description: Blend from minimal ink wash to luminous neon script

name: Erosion Strata
description: Procedural sedimentary rock layers carved by domain-warped erosion channels, revealing mineral veins, fossil imprints, and weathered edges. Features atmospheric haze, subsurface scattering, and geological era palette cycling.
author: AI

params.name: Erosion Depth
params.description: Depth of erosion channels cutting through sedimentary layers

params.name: Layer Density
params.description: Density of horizontal sedimentary layers

params.name: Mineral Veins
params.description: Prominence of Voronoi mineral vein networks

params.name: Water Level
params.description: Vertical water level submerging lower canyon layers

name: Ethereal Anemone Bloom
description: A pulsating, infinite underwater expanse of translucent, bioluminescent anemone-like structures that gently sway in an invisible current, reaching out to feed on the audio frequencies.

params.name: Swimming Speed
params.description: Speed of medusa movement

params.name: Tentacle Curl
params.description: Curliness of tentacles

params.name: Quantum Glow
params.description: Glow intensity

params.name: Repulsion Strength
params.description: Mouse repulsion strength

name: Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
description: Multi-state cellular automata where the rules themselves slowly evolve based on local conditions and global audio input. Audio drives genetic pressure on the automata. Mouse introduces invasive species or protected zones. Organic coral-like emergent structures that change fundamental behavior over time.

params.name: Cell Scale
params.description: Scale of the cellular automata grid

params.name: Evolution Speed
params.description: Speed of rule evolution and mutation

params.name: Invasive Force
params.description: Strength of mouse-planted invasive species

params.name: Bioluminescence
params.description: Bioluminescent glow intensity

name: Feedback Echo Chamber
description: Multi-layer temporal echo with feedback decay, creating ghost images of previous frames fading into depth with color grading per layer

name: Fractal Clockwork
description: Infinite interlocking brass gears rotating in perfect mechanical sync. Steampunk raymarched masterpiece with metallic PBR shading and mouse orbit control.
author: ford442

name: Fractured Monolith
description: A massive, ancient monolith floating above a dark liquid sea, fractured into segmented pieces that pulse with an inner, ethereal light.

name: Ghost Flame
description: Fluid advection flame simulation with temperature-based alpha translucency. Hot regions are bright and slightly translucent, cool regions fade to transparent. Simplex noise advection with upward velocity and vorticity confinement creates ethereal ghost-fire.

name: Glacial-Aether Quantum-Cavern
description: An infinitely deep, freezing subterranean cavern of quantum ice that glows with auroral aether-plasma, physically cracking and echoing with kaleidoscopic light refractions upon heavy bass impulses.

name: Gravitational Strain Field
description: Orbiting gravity wells warp a procedural star field via geodesic ray integration. Tidal emission glows brightest where gravitational gradients collide — dark matter visualization as art.
author: AI

params.name: Well Count
params.description: Number of gravity wells (maps to 1–6).

params.name: Well Mass
params.description: Mass of each gravity well — controls bending strength.

params.name: Bend Strength
params.description: Overall geodesic deflection amplitude.

params.name: Emission Scale
params.description: Brightness of tidal emission at field gradient maxima.

name: Gravito-Phononic Accretion
description: Multiple audio-driven gravitational centers that accrete and sculpt procedural density fields with gravitational lensing distortion. Different audio bands control different gravitational bodies. Mouse can add temporary mass concentration. Dark cores with swirling filamentary gas.

params.name: Mass Scale
params.description: Mass of gravitational bodies

params.name: Body Count
params.description: Number of gravitational bodies

params.name: Lens Strength
params.description: Intensity of gravitational lensing distortion

params.name: Gas Density
params.description: Density of accreted gas and filamentary structures

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed of rotation

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Form complexity

params.name: Bloom Intensity
params.description: Bloom glow intensity

params.name: Gravity Well Strength
params.description: Gravity well pull strength

name: Holographic Bismuth-Core Reactor
description: A hyper-dimensional, endlessly unfolding bismuth core reactor, merging metallic stepped-fractals with liquid-holographic interference patterns.

name: Holographic Data Core
description: An infinite journey through a quantum lattice of glowing data nodes and pulsing circuits.

name: Holographic Lens-Flare Matrix
description: Generate a matrix of holographic lens flares that follow motion in the video or a synthetic flow field.
author: Jules

name: Holographic Membrane
description: Thin-film interference membrane that undulates with depth-based alpha translucency. Audio drives vibration and iridescence; mouse controls viewing angle for rainbow interference patterns.

name: Holographic Plasma-Geode
description: A hyper-dimensional geode cracked open to reveal a swirling, audio-reactive core of liquid plasma and holographic fractal crystals.

name: Hyper-Dimensional Tesseract-Labyrinth
description: A dizzying, gravity-defying maze of glowing hyper-cubes that unfold and rotate through 4D space, creating impossible, Escher-like geometries driven by sound.

name: Hyper Labyrinth
description: A 4D maze visualization with neon aesthetics and evolving geometry. Use mouse to orbit the hyper-structure.

sliders.name: Fluid Viscosity
sliders.description: Viscosity of the fluid merging effect

name: Hyperbolic Crystal Symbiosis
description: Competing and cooperating crystal growth occurring in hyperbolic (Poincaré disk) geometry. Local curvature influenced by audio and mouse position. Exquisite non-Euclidean tiling patterns with iridescent jewel-like coloring and beautiful symmetry breaking.

params.name: Growth Speed
params.description: Speed of hyperbolic crystal growth

params.name: Competition
params.description: Crystal competition level and symmetry breaking

params.name: Curvature
params.description: Hyperbolic curvature magnitude

params.name: Mutation
params.description: Crystal growth mutation and irregularity

name: Hyperbolic Tessellation Engine
description: Non-Euclidean Poincaré-disk tessellation in real-time. Hyperbolic tiles subdivide infinitely toward the boundary disk, colored by recursive depth — M.C. Escher meets fractals.
author: AI

params.name: Tile Symmetry
params.description: Number of sides in the fundamental tile (maps to p=3–8).

params.name: Depth Color
params.description: Hue offset for depth-based coloring.

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed and direction of the global hyperbolic rotation.

params.name: Boundary Glow
params.description: Brightness of the glow near the Poincaré disk boundary.

name: Hyperbolic Tree Fractal
description: Recursive tree fractal rendered in hyperbolic Poincare disk. Branches sway with audio, leaves glow with treble. Möbius-transformed space.

params.name: Tree Depth
params.description: Recursion depth of branching

params.name: Branch Angle
params.description: Angle between child branches

params.name: Color Shift
params.description: Base hue rotation

params.name: Saturation
params.description: Color saturation

name: Inverse Mandelbrot Realm
description: Instead of iterating coordinates, we iterate color-space vectors through the Mandelbrot map. Each pixel's RGB becomes a complex number that orbits and escapes, creating alien fractal color fields.
author: AI

params.name: Iterations
params.description: Maximum iteration count (maps to 20–80).

params.name: Color Zoom
params.description: Zoom level into the color-space fractal.

params.name: Colormap Rotate
params.description: Global hue rotation of the colormap.

params.name: Bailout Radius
params.description: Escape radius — lower values create more intricate boundaries.

name: Isometric Cyber-City
description: An infinite procedural isometric city with neon lights and traffic.

params.name: Density
params.description: Building density and height variance

params.name: Traffic Speed
params.description: Speed of traffic and flyover

params.name: Neon Glow
params.description: Intensity of neon window glow

params.name: Building Height Scale
params.description: Scale of building heights

name: Kinetic Neo-Brutalist Megastructure
description: An endlessly shifting, gravity-defying neo-brutalist megastructure of colossal floating concrete blocks that grind and interlock, revealing glowing, audio-reactive server cores hidden within.

name: Klein Bottle Walk
description: Parametric walk across a Klein bottle surface with FBM texture, diffuse/specular lighting, and audio-reactive color modulation.

params.name: Walk Speed
params.description: Speed of surface traversal

params.name: Texture Density
params.description: FBM surface texture detail

params.name: Light Intensity
params.description: Specular highlight strength

params.name: Color Shift
params.description: Base color offset

name: Lenia 2.0 - Multi-Species
description: Advanced 4-species Lenia with 4 distinct kernels (Ring, Disk, Gaussian, Sharp Cross). Creatures evolve, compete, and merge. Mouse feeds different species. Truly alive.
author: ford442

name: Lichtenberg Storm
description: Dielectric breakdown fractal patterns with phosphorescent afterglow and storm pulses. Branching discharge trees grow from multiple seed points with HDR bloom, halation glow, and electric palette.
author: AI

params.name: Branch Jitter
params.description: Brownian motion jitter on branch angles

params.name: Glow Intensity
params.description: HDR bloom intensity on discharge branches and tips

params.name: Storm Frequency
params.description: Frequency of periodic electrical storm pulses

params.name: Afterglow Persistence
params.description: Phosphorescent afterglow decay persistence via temporal feedback

name: Liquid-Crystal Hive-Mind
description: A vast, breathing network of hexagonal bio-synthetic cells containing turbulent, iridescent liquid crystals that synchronize and glow with a pulsing collective consciousness.

name: Liquid-Neon Cyber-Metropolis
author: Jules
description: An infinite, gravity-defying cyberpunk cityscape constructed from rivers of hyper-luminescent liquid neon and dark matter concrete, where architectural monoliths dynamically extrude, twist, and warp their geometry to the rhythm of heavy audio frequencies.

name: Lorenz Attractor Flow
description: Real-time visualization of the Lorenz strange attractor using GPU-accelerated ODE integration. Features chaotic butterfly-wing patterns, mouse perturbation, and temporal color evolution.

name: Lorenz Attractor
description: Strange attractor density accumulation. Each pixel seeds a short Lorenz trajectory near an equilibrium lobe; Gaussian kernel splatting onto the x-z projection builds the iconic butterfly over many frames of temporal Monte Carlo integration. Bass widens the rho parameter for more chaotic spread; mouse pans the view.

name: Luminescent Chrono-Fluid Astrolabe
description: A hyper-intricate, multi-dimensional astrolabe forged from flowing liquid-gold plasma and hard-light holograms, endlessly spinning and realigning its cosmic rings in perfect synchronization with audio frequencies.

name: Luminous-Fluid Chladni-Resonator
description: A mesmerizing, bioluminescent liquid surface that physically organizes itself into hyper-complex, evolving Chladni resonant figures driven by low-frequency audio interference patterns.

name: Magnetic Ferrofluid
description: A pulsating, dark metallic liquid with sharp spikes that respond to an oscillating magnetic field.

params.name: Magnetic Strength (Spikes)
params.description: Controls the height and intensity of the fluid spikes.

params.name: Fluid Density
params.description: Controls how many small spikes and structures form.

params.name: Oscillation Speed
params.description: Speed at which the fluid pulsates and shifts.

params.name: Iridescence Shift
params.description: Shifts the thin-film interference colors on the metallic surface.

name: Magnetic Field Lines
description: Magnetic dipole field visualization with field lines and charged particles following the field, featuring North (blue) and South (red) poles

name: Magnetic Field Warp
author: Jules
description: Charged particles warped by a magnetic field with domain-warped FBM turbulence, curl-noise vortices, and Clifford strange-attractor modulation.

name: Magnetic Storm
description: A dynamic magnetic field storm using divergence-free curl noise to render flowing field lines. The mouse sets the magnetic pole; bass drives flow speed and storm intensity; mids shift field-line color; treble adds sparkle.

name: Micro-Cosmos
description: A microscopic view of a teeming liquid universe, filled with procedural microorganisms, drifting particles, and organic structures.

name: Multi-Scale Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
description: A multi-state cellular automata system where growth rules slowly evolve based on local conditions and global audio input. Audio drives genetic pressure on the automata. Mouse introduces invasive species or protected zones. Organic, plant-like emergent structures that change their fundamental behavior over time.

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: How quickly the growth rules evolve over time

params.name: Species Competition
params.description: How fiercely species compete for resources

params.name: Fertility
params.description: Resource regeneration rate in the environment

params.name: Diversity
params.description: Number of distinct species behaviors present

name: Murmuration Phantom
description: Starling murmuration simulation — thousands of dark birds flowing in organic, ever-changing shapes against a twilight sky. The flock morphs between coherent structures driven by a curl noise flow field, with individual birds only visible as subtle silver glints at the edges. Bass drives flock density, mids morph between swarm shapes, treble adds edge glints, and mouse creates predator disturbance.

params.name: Flock Size
params.description: Overall size and spread of the flock

params.name: Shape Morph
params.description: Morph between sphere, torus, wave, and random flock shapes

params.name: Glint Intensity
params.description: Brightness of silver edge glints where light catches individual birds

params.name: Cohesion
params.description: How tightly the flock holds together

name: Mycelium Network
description: Growing network patterns resembling fungal mycelium with diffusion-limited aggregation branching and bioluminescent tips

name: Nebula Light-Trail Swarm
description: Photon-like particles race through the scene leaving glowing, fading trails that pulse with audio. Creates a constantly reforming nebula.

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Rotation speed of the astrolabe

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Number of ring layers

params.name: Glow Intensity
params.description: Glow intensity

params.name: Gravity Well Strength
params.description: Mouse gravity attraction

name: Neon-Plasma Biomechanical Hive
description: A hyper-organic, biomechanical labyrinth of pulsing neon circuitry and breathing metallic tissue that spawns luminescent plasma-spores reacting to ambient cosmic frequencies.

name: Neural Bioluminescence Matrix
description: A pulsing, infinite organic matrix of glowing synthetic neurons firing quantum light impulses across a void, merging biological growth with cybernetic circuitry.

name: Neural Fractal
description: Neural network weight visualization style fractals using sigmoid, tanh, and swish activation functions instead of standard z²+c iterations

name: Neural Network Glow
description: Render a glowing neural mesh and drive action-potential pulses with audio, creating a living synapse network that lights up in layers.

name: Neuro-Cosmos
description: A mesmerizing 3D generative visualization of a structure that visually bridges the gap between a biological neural network and the cosmic web of the universe.

name: Neuro-Kinetic Bloom
description: A vast, deep-sea garden of biomechanical, neon-veined flora that dynamically uncoils and pulses with quantum energy, its tendrils whipping and synchronizing to the rhythm of sound.

name: Neuro-Kinetic Liquid-Gold Lotus
description: A hyper-organic, slowly unfurling macro-lotus made of liquid-gold geometry that dynamically responds to acoustic impulses, its petals rippling with neuro-kinetic plasma energy.

name: Obsidian Echo-Chamber
author: Jules
description: An infinite, abyssal expanse of highly polished, brutalist obsidian monoliths that react to audio by emitting and reflecting brilliant, luminescent echolocation ripples across their glassy surfaces.

name: Phase-Transition Memory Weave
description: A viscous history-dependent field undergoing phase transitions between fluid, crystalline, and chaotic states with strong visual memory of past configurations. Audio controls phase transition thresholds. Mouse locally forces phase changes. Beautiful hysteresis and pattern retention.

params.name: Viscosity
params.description: Material memory and viscous resistance to change

params.name: Phase Scale
params.description: Spatial scale of phase domain structures

params.name: Transition Sharpness
params.description: Sharpness of phase boundary transitions

params.name: Glow Intensity
params.description: Overall glow and luminosity of the material

name: Photonic Crystal-Brain
author: Jules
description: An infinite, glowing network of hyper-refractive crystal neurons that fire iridescent plasma pulses in sync with audio frequencies, generating volumetric glowing synapses within a dark cosmic void.

name: Physarum (Slime Mold) Sacred Geometry
description: A psychedelic organic simulation where millions of microscopic agents feed on video input, leaving vibrant, glowing, fractal trails that pulse with audio.

name: Plasma Mandala
description: A psychedelic plasma mandala with audio-driven radial symmetry, spinning petal folds, and mouse-attracted center. Bass drives spin speed, mids shift hue, treble adds sparkle.

name: Prismatic Aether-Loom
description: A hyper-dimensional weaving machine where threads of liquid light are spun into iridescent fabrics of space-time, dynamically reacting to audio frequencies and cosmic winds.

name: Prismatic Bismuth Lattice
description: Endlessly folding hyper-geometric expanse of iridescent bismuth crystals with physical light transmission. Features thin-film interference, metallic Fresnel reflection, and oxide layer transmission.

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Recursion depth of hopper crystal formation

params.name: Iridescence
params.description: Thin-film interference color intensity

params.name: Crystal Scale
params.description: Size of crystal lattice cells

params.name: Fog Density
params.description: Atmospheric fog density

name: Prismatic Crystal Growth
description: SDF crystal lattice that grows over time with Fresnel reflectance for glass-like translucency. Alpha encodes crystal thickness — thin edges are transparent, thick centers opaque. Audio drives growth rate and crystal rotation.

name: Prismatic Fractal-Dunes
description: An infinite, shifting desert where the sand grains are micro-prisms, rippling and flowing like liquid glass under cosmic winds and erupting into chromatic geysers of light to the rhythm of sound.

name: Prismatic Ion Cascade
description: Mouse-anchored cascade of prismatic ion streams. Curl-warped angular bands radiate from the cursor with chromatic spectral split, fbm-driven shimmer, and audio-reactive flicker. Bass pulses the radial core, mids drive flow speed, treble adds sparkle.

name: Prismatic Void-Weaver Ouroboros
description: A hyper-dimensional, endlessly twisting serpentine ring forged of chromatic plasma and fractal dark matter.

name: Protocell Division
description: Synthetic biology oil droplets in water that divide and merge like protocells. Rainbow-colored oil slicks on spherical membranes, organic blob shapes deforming under surface tension, and sudden division events where one cell splits into two. Bass triggers division events, mids control surface tension, treble adds membrane vibration ripples, and mouse attracts nearby blobs.

params.name: Cell Count
params.description: Number of protocells visible in the field

params.name: Surface Tension
params.description: Roundness vs amoeboid deformation of cell membranes

params.name: Iridescence
params.description: Intensity of thin-film interference rainbow colors

params.name: Division Rate
params.description: Speed of cell division and merging cycles

name: Psychedelic Layered Time-Stamps
description: Overlay multiple delayed copies of the video, each with a different color offset and evolving distortion.

name: Psychedelic Time-Warp Kaleidoscope
description: Mirror the image around a dynamic axis with a time-varying mirror count. Reflection vectors are distorted by a 3D noise field for a shimmering kaleidoscope.
author: Jules

name: Quantum Aether-Origami
description: A hyper-dimensional expanse of iridescent, self-folding light-sheets that crease, snap, and unfold like cosmic origami, collapsing into singularities to the beat of sound.

name: Quantum-Fluorescent Aether-Moth Swarm
description: A hyper-dense, glowing swarm of ethereal quantum 'moths' that dynamically flock and self-organize into luminous geometric mandalas, reacting violently to acoustic frequencies.

name: Quantum Foam Alpha
description: Particle positions rendered as quantum probability clouds with uncertainty-based alpha translucency. Audio drives vacuum fluctuations and pair creation; mouse measurement collapses the wavefunction.

name: Quantum Mycelium
description: A hyper-organic, microscopic journey through an infinitely growing, glowing fungal network that pulses with data-like energy and branches dynamically based on spatial noise.

name: Quantum Superposition Lattice
description: Particles exist in quantum superposition — visible at multiple Lissajous-orbit positions simultaneously as Gaussian probability clouds. Mouse clicks collapse the wave function locally.
author: AI

params.name: Particle Count
params.description: Number of quantum particles (maps to 1–8).

params.name: Decoherence
params.description: Wave-function spread (decoherence / Gaussian sigma).

params.name: Wave Speed
params.description: Oscillation frequency of the quantum wave functions.

params.name: Wavefunction Opacity
params.description: Probability cloud opacity scale.

name: Quasicrystal
description: Penrose tiling-inspired quasicrystal patterns with n-fold symmetry using the projection method from higher-dimensional lattices

name: Radiant Chrono-Glass Nautilus
description: A hyper-organic, infinitely spiraling nautilus shell forged from refractive chrono-glass and glowing liquid-plasma.

name: Radiant Quantum-Crystalline Forge
description: A majestic, zero-gravity forge where infinite quantum crystals self-assemble into intricate fractal geometries, pulsating with radiant chromatic energy and refracting light in a dazzling abyssal void.

name: Raptor Mini
description: Fast predatory mini raptor agents chase the mouse and strike with claws. Audio rage mode boosts speed and attacks.

name: Recursive Ancestral Terrains
description: Fractal landscape generator where terrain features carry genetic parameters from parent generations. The mouse position locally selects which ancestral lineage is expressed, creating alien mountain ranges with evolutionary history. Audio controls mutation rate and generational blending.

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: Rate of genetic mutation between terrain generations

params.name: Generation Depth
params.description: Number of ancestral generations rendered

params.name: Height Scale
params.description: Vertical exaggeration of the terrain

params.name: Erosion
params.description: Amount of geological erosion carving channels

name: RGB Diffraction
description: Simulates a multi-slit diffraction grating where separate red, green, and blue wavelengths produce offset interference fringe patterns. Six-fold rotational symmetry creates a spectral starburst. Slit orientation and frequency pulse to audio for reactive prism effects.

name: Sentient Aether-Flora Biosphere
author: Jules
description: A hyper-organic, bioluminescent extraterrestrial terrarium where fractal aether-spores drift and blossom into complex, sentient crystalline flora that pulse with cosmic energy in sync with ambient audio.

name: Silica Tsunami
description: A slow-motion wave of refractive glass-like particles that crests and shatters, dynamically reshaping around the mouse and reacting to audio amplitude.

name: Singularity Forge
description: A hyper-dense, gravity-warped crucible of collapsing stars and chaotic plasma rings, endlessly generating and consuming geometric artifacts.

name: Sonoluminescent Chrono-Geode Matrix
description: A colossal, infinitely shattering crystalline geode that fractures to reveal a violently erupting sonoluminescent plasma core.

name: Spectral Ferrofluid
description: Magnetic ferrofluid simulation with field-strength alpha translucency and audio-reactive spikes. Mouse acts as a magnetic source while temporal feedback creates organic fluid memory.

name: Stellar Plasma-Ouroboros
description: An infinite, self-consuming mechanical serpent made of fractured glass scales and stellar plasma.

name: Stellar Web-Loom
description: A hyper-dimensional cosmic loom weaving infinite tendrils of starlight and plasma silk across a dark void, blending organic neuro-network vibes with vast, mechanical astrophysics.

name: Strange Field Flow
description: A strange-attractor flow field blending Peter de Jong and Clifford attractor maps. Each pixel evaluates iterated orbit density and paints acid-neon whorls. Attractor coefficients pulse to bass and treble, morphing the topology. Temporal persistence burns psychedelic trails.

name: String Theory
description: Vibrating string visualizations with interference patterns and harmonics based on the 1D wave equation

name: Superfluid Quantum-Foam
description: A mesmerizing, hyper-turbulent ocean of boiling quantum probability foam, where iridescent hyper-bubbles merge and burst in sync with audio frequencies, releasing flashes of raw cosmic energy.

name: Supernova Remnant
description: Expanding shell structures with shockwave physics and Rayleigh-Taylor instability patterns, inspired by Hubble nebula images

name: Symbiotic Chrono-Mycelium Engine
description: A hyper-organic, ever-evolving cybernetic mycelial network that metabolizes temporal energy, pulsing with luminescent plasma as it entwines around a central quantum gear.

name: Symbiotic Light Networks
description: A network of light-conducting organic structures that grow, compete, and support each other while transporting and transforming light in complex ways. Audio influences light color, intensity, and transmission rules. Mouse seeds or prunes the network. Bioluminescent organic networks with complex internal light transport.

params.name: Network Density
params.description: Density and complexity of the light network

params.name: Competition
params.description: 0=symbiotic amplification, 1=competitive suppression

params.name: Light Intensity
params.description: Intensity of bioluminescent light transport

params.name: Growth Phase
params.description: Network growth phase (0=growing, 1=mature)

name: Temporal Motion Smear
description: Motion-aware temporal smearing using frame differencing and directional blur, creating colorful trails that follow moving objects

name: Topological Acoustic Knots
description: Orientational director field inspired by liquid crystals where audio frequencies drive topological defect creation, motion, and annihilation. Mouse can pin or create defects. Iridescent oil-slick coloring with flowing directional fields.

params.name: Defect Density
params.description: Number of topological defect singularities

params.name: Defect Speed
params.description: How fast defects move and pair/annihilate

params.name: Iridescence
params.description: Intensity of oil-slick iridescent coloring

params.name: Flow Strength
params.description: Strength of painterly flow field stripes

name: Topological Phase Weave
description: A simulation of nematic liquid crystal fields where audio frequencies control topological defect creation, motion, and annihilation, producing mesmerizing swirling defect lattices with iridescent color mapping.

name: Topology Flow
description: Topological surface flow visualization inspired by Morse theory, showing gradient flows converging and diverging at critical points

name: Torus Knot Rainbow
description: A (p,q) torus knot projected onto the 2D plane with perspective. The knotted curve is rendered as a thick rainbow-hued ribbon that rotates and morphs its winding numbers over time. Audio modulates the longitude frequency for reactive topology shifts.

name: Translucent Nebula
description: Volumetric gas clouds with density-based alpha translucency. FBM and Worley noise create organic nebula structure where dense cores are opaque and edges fade to transparent. Star sparkle reacts to treble and nebula pulses with bass.

name: Velocity Bloom
description: Velocity-sensitive bloom effect that intensifies on motion, creating multi-octave glow with white core and colored aura based on velocity

name: Vitreous Chrono-Chandelier
description: An infinite, abyssal cavern illuminated by a colossal, self-assembling chandelier of hyper-refractive glass chimes and glowing quantum pendulums that shatter and reform to the rhythm of time and sound.

name: Von Kármán Vortex Street
description: Analytic vortex-street flow visualization. Ten alternating point-vortex pairs shed behind the mouse-driven obstacle; their combined streamfunction ψ = U·y + Σ ±(Γ/2π)·ln(r) produces isocontours tracing the classic Kármán street wake. Bass drives shedding speed; mids vary vortex separation for staggered or aligned rows.

name: Voronoi Crystal
description: Animated crystal growth using Voronoi diagrams with time-evolving seeds, featuring icy facets and rainbow iridescence

name: Xeno-Botanical Synth-Flora
description: A dense, alien jungle of luminescent, synthetic flora that blooms and breathes with the rhythm of sound, blending organic curves with crystalline cybernetic materials.

name: Xeno-Mycelial Resonance-Web
description: An infinite, subterranean expanse of bioluminescent, hyper-dimensional mycelium that rhythmically pulses, grows, and interconnects its glowing neural networks in response to audio frequencies.

name: Zeta Function Landscape
description: Riemann zeta function visualization on the critical line. Magnitude creates landscape height, zeros form valleys. Audio reactivity modulates term count and color cycling.

params.name: Sigma Offset
params.description: Deviation from critical line (0.5)

params.name: T Range
params.description: Width of t-axis exploration

params.name: Height Scale
params.description: Vertical exaggeration of landscape

params.name: Term Precision
params.description: Zeta series term count

name: System Monitor
description: Cyberpunk system monitor demonstrating mouse inputs, time, and frame feedback.

name: Greenberg-Hastings Automaton
description: Excitable cellular medium with firing, refractory cooling, bass-driven spontaneous ignition, and mouse-triggered wavefronts.

name: Vorticity Raincloud
description: Audio-reactive cloudscape with curl-noise advection, buoyant thunderheads, Mie silver lining, and rain sheets driven by stored flow.

name: Domain-Warped FBM Grid
description: Audio-reactive domain-warped FBM grid with mouse gravity well, recursive moiré sub-grids, chromatic dispersion edges, and temporal motion blur.

name: Buddhabrot Nebula
description: Audio-reactive Buddhabrot orbit accumulation with bass-breathing sample count, mids hue shift, treble sparkle stars, mouse-driven panning, orbital rainbow trails, and ACES temporal accumulation.

name: Spherical Harmonics Plasma
description: Audio-reactive 3D gas giant using Y(l,m) spherical harmonics with HDR ACES tone mapping, Rayleigh limb scattering, mouse-driven light, and treble-triggered lightning tendrils.

name: SmoothLife Predator-Prey
description: Two-species SmoothLife cellular automaton with Lotka-Volterra predator-prey dynamics. Species A (green prey) uses Rafler 2011 birth/survival rules; species B (red predator) grows on prey density and decays without it. Audio bass drives prey birth-rate, treble drives predator decay, mids control coupling strength.

name: Stratified Erosion Terrain
description: Depth-aware terrain with sediment transport, layered rock hardness, reflective valley water tables, wind abrasion, and bass-driven seismic uplift.

name: Cylindrical Drum Modes
description: Vibrating circular membrane Bessel function modal synthesis: u_{mn} = J_m(α_{mn}·r/R)·cos(mφ)·cos(ω_{mn}·t). GPU polynomial Bessel J₀–J₃ (Abramowitz & Stegun). Audio bands activate mode families (bass→radial, mids→azimuthal, treble→higher-order). Chladni node-line colouring.

name: Worley Cellular
description: Audio-reactive Worley cellular fields with thin-film interference edge glow and micro-cosmic starfields hidden inside each cell.

name: Hyper Warp
description: Advanced domain warping with fractal noise and reaction-diffusion feedback.

name: Julia Set — Orbit Trap
description: Generalised Julia set iteration z^n+c for n=2..6 with smooth (continuous) iteration count μ=i−log₂(log₂|z|), multi-trap orbit colouring (circle, line, cross traps), and animated Julia parameter c orbiting a Mandelbrot cardioid boundary. Audio-driven trap scale.

name: Kimi Crystal
description: Animated crystalline structures growing on a hexagonal grid with physical light transmission. Features ice IOR-based Fresnel reflection, purity-based absorption, and variable crystal thickness.

params.name: Grid Density
params.description: Density of hexagonal crystal grid

params.name: Crystal Purity
params.description: Ice crystal clarity: affects transmission and absorption

params.name: Growth Speed
params.description: Animation speed of crystal growth

params.name: Crystal Thickness
params.description: Physical thickness affecting light path length

name: Kimi Nebula
description: Cosmic nebula cloud swirls with ethereal gas formations, twinkling stars, and mouse-driven stellar winds.

name: Mandelbulb 3D
description: 3D Mandelbulb fractal with ray marching, orbit trap coloring, soft shadows, and distance-based alpha for atmospheric depth

name: Lorenz Strange Attractor
description: Audio-reactive Lorenz strange attractor (σ, ρ, β) with bioluminescent depth halos and persistent scent trails. Mids drive rotation, bass adds streams, treble jitters chaos.

name: Superformula Spirograph Spiral
description: Superformula-driven spirograph spiral with nested epicycles, audio-reactive petal modulation, mouse-centered orbit drift, and temporal feedback warping.

name: Quantum Foam
description: Quantum vacuum fluctuation visualization with virtual particle pairs, entanglement webs, and HDR volumetric glow

name: Rainbow Smoke with Dual Scattering
description: Multi-scale rainbow smoke with vorticity confinement, buoyancy, Rayleigh edge glow, and Mie-lit cores driven by bass and treble.

name: FitzHugh-Nagumo Excitable Media
description: Dual-mode excitable media: Gray-Scott morphogenesis or FitzHugh-Nagumo action-potential waves with mouse/current injection and bass-triggered pulses.

name: Boids Flocking
description: Audio-reactive Reynolds boids flocking with bass-driven panic, mids cohesion, treble flash bursts, mouse attraction, motion-blur streaks, and pheromone trails.

name: Fluid Ripples
description: Audio-reactive water ripple simulation with wave interference. Bass amplifies wave energy and mouse-driven pulses. Parameters control intensity, speed, scale, and damping detail.

name: Psychedelic Swirls
description: Generative swirling vortex fields with multi-layer procedural noise flow and spectral rainbow HSV cycles.

name: Turing Veins Generative
description: Generative multiscale reaction-diffusion Turing patterns forming organic vein networks.

name: Gravito-Phononic Accretion
description: Multiple gravitational centers driven by different audio bands accrete density into beautiful organic structures. Includes gravitational lensing distortion. Mouse can temporarily increase gravity in a region.

params.name: Accretion Speed
params.description: How fast material collects around gravitational centers

params.name: Lensing Strength
params.description: Amount of gravitational light distortion

params.name: Material Diffusion
params.description: How much material spreads out

params.name: Mouse Gravity Power
params.description: Temporary mass added when mouse is held

name: Holographic Interference
description: Holographic rainbow patterns with interference fringes, multi-layer ghosting with staggered alpha, and wavelength-dependent diffraction

name: Hyperbolic Crystal Symbiosis
description: Two crystal species grow and compete within a hyperbolic space. Bass increases aggression between species while mids encourage beautiful symbiotic blending. Mouse position warps local curvature.

params.name: Base Curvature
params.description: Strength of the hyperbolic distortion

params.name: Species Tension
params.description: How strongly the two crystal types compete

params.name: Symbiotic Tendency
params.description: Encourages beautiful blending between species

params.name: Mouse Curvature Power
params.description: How strongly the mouse warps local geometry

name: Neural Swarm
description: Agent-based neural network visualization with signal propagation, connection weights, and emergent activation patterns

name: Kimi Flock Symphony
description: Advanced particle flocking simulation with musical visualization, featuring separation, alignment, cohesion, and mouse interaction.
author: Kimi

name: Kimi Fractal Dreams
description: Multi-layer fractal with orbit traps, burning ship variant, and smooth color cycling.

name: Kimi Nebula Depth
description: Volumetric nebula with 3D noise, ray marching, and depth-based color grading.

name: Kimi Quantum Field
description: Wave interference patterns with uncertainty visualization and probability densities.

name: Liquid Crystal
description: Liquid crystal optical effects with birefringent double refraction, twisted nematic polarization rotation, and Schlieren texture

name: Magnetic Ferrofluid
description: Interactive ferrofluid simulation with magnetic field lines, Rosensweig instability spike formation, and metallic iridescent rendering

name: Multi-Scale Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
description: Two competing cellular species whose growth rules slowly evolve under audio pressure. The garden changes its fundamental behavior over time while remaining visually coherent.

params.name: Mutation Pressure
params.description: How quickly the growth rules evolve

params.name: Species Competition
params.description: How fiercely the two species compete

params.name: Resource Fertility
params.description: How much new resources appear

params.name: Mouse Nurturing Power
params.description: How much the mouse can locally boost growth

name: Nebula Gyroid
description: Ethereal, flowing organic form created with raymarched gyroid SDFs. Features iridescent lighting, multiple blended gyroid layers, and mouse-reactive domain warping for a fluid geometry effect.
author: minimax.ai

name: Phase Memory Weave
description: A viscous material that remembers its past while undergoing audio-driven phase transitions between fluid and crystalline states. Strong history creates beautiful hysteresis and pattern retention.

params.name: Phase
params.description: Fluid vs Crystalline state

params.name: Memory Strength
params.description: How strongly the material remembers its history

params.name: Turbulence
params.description: Adds chaotic movement in fluid state

params.name: Mouse Disturbance
params.description: How strongly the mouse can force local phase changes

name: Psychedelic Rainbow Swirls
description: Generative swirling vortex fields with multi-layer procedural noise flow, spectral rainbow HSV cycles from polar angles, temporal twisting, and psychedelic distortion. Mouse attracts swirls; ripples spawn color bursts.

name: Recursive Ancestral Terrains
description: A fractal landscape where different ancestral 'lineages' of terrain rules coexist. Moving the mouse selects which generational traits are expressed in different regions, revealing the evolutionary history of the land.

params.name: Lineage Blend
params.description: How strongly different ancestral traits mix

params.name: Mutation Rate
params.description: How much audio influences variation between generations

params.name: Terrain Roughness
params.description: Overall jaggedness of the landscape

params.name: Historical Depth
params.description: How visible the 'memory' of previous generations is

name: Phosphor Dream
description: Authentic CRT simulation with RGB phosphor triads, persistence afterglow, interlaced flicker, barrel distortion, and chromatic aberration

name: Analytic Noise Flow
description: Perlin noise with analytic derivatives for ultra-smooth flow fields. Gradient computed alongside noise value in single evaluation, eliminating finite-difference jitter for perfectly parallel streamlines.

name: Distance Field Text
description: SDF-based procedural glyph overlay. Generates abstract runes and symbols as signed distance fields with infinitely smooth scaling, glowing edges, drop shadows, and chromatic cycling.

name: Quaternion Julia
description: 4D quaternion Julia set raymarched in real-time. The 4th dimension animates over time creating organic morphing fractal forms with orbit-trap coloring and physically-based lighting.

name: Stellar Plasma
description: An endlessly morphing procedural cosmos powered by domain-warped fractional brownian motion. Creates swirling, liquid-like cosmic nebulae with interactive mouse gravity.
author: Gemini 3.1 Pro Vertex

name: Symbiotic Light Propagation Networks
description: Two organic species grow while transporting and transforming light through their network. They support each other symbiotically while competing for resources. Mouse seeds new growth while audio controls light color and transmission.

params.name: Network Growth
params.description: How fast the light-carrying network expands

params.name: Light Transmission
params.description: How efficiently light travels through the network

params.name: Symbiotic Strength
params.description: How much the two species help each other

params.name: Mouse Seeding Power
params.description: How strongly the mouse can plant new network nodes

name: Topological Acoustic Knots
description: A nematic orientation field where audio frequencies drive the birth, motion, and annihilation of topological defects. Bass and treble create defects while mids control their mobility. Mouse can pin or generate new singularities.

params.name: Defect Density
params.description: How many defects are created by audio

params.name: Defect Mobility
params.description: How fast defects move and interact

params.name: Defect Pairing
params.description: Tendency for defects to annihilate in pairs

params.name: Mouse Pinning Strength
params.description: How strongly the mouse can pin or create defects

name: Turing Veins
description: Generative multiscale reaction-diffusion Turing patterns forming organic vein/networks with bioluminescent glow. Procedurally evolves over time; depth increases complexity; mouse perturbs fields. Subtly distorts and overlays input image.

name: Volumetric Cloud Nebula
description: Raymarched volumetric clouds with nebula coloring. Features procedural cloud generation with FBM noise, dynamic color palettes, and animated camera movement through a cosmic nebula.
author: Kimi

params.name: Cloud Density
params.description: Density of the volumetric clouds

params.name: Color Shift
params.description: Shifts the nebula color palette

params.name: Camera Distance
params.description: Distance of camera from nebula center

params.name: Extinction
params.description: Light extinction coefficient in the nebula

name: Wolfram Data Demo
description: Demonstrates scientific constants and mathematical functions from Wolfram Alpha. Features phyllotaxis patterns, Airy disk diffraction, Fibonacci spirals, and atmospheric scattering using real physical data.
